description:
Implement `hx-drawer` (T2 tier) — 4/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Slide-in panel from any edge of the viewport.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-drawer.ts`, `hx-drawer.styles.ts`, `hx-drawer.stories.ts`, `hx-drawer.test.ts`

**Props:** `open` (boolean), `placement` (`start`|`end`|`top`|`bottom`, default `end`), `size` (`sm`|`md`|`lg`|`full` or CSS string), `contained` (boolean — constrain to parent instead of viewport), `noHeader` (boolean), `noFooter` (boolean)

**Slots:** `label` (drawer title), `header-actions` (buttons near close), default (body content), `footer` (action buttons)

**Events:** `hx-show`, `hx-after-show`, `hx-hide`, `hx-after-hide`, `hx-initial-focus`

**CSS Parts:** `overlay`, `panel`, `header`, `title`, `close-button`, `body`, `footer`

**ARIA:** `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal="true"`, `aria-labelledby` pointing to title. Focus trapped inside when open. Escape key closes. Return focus to trigger on close.

**Animation:** Slides in from placement edge. CSS transition with `prefers-reduced-motion` support.

**Overlay:** Semi-transparent backdrop, click closes drawer.

**Study:** `hx-dialog` for the modal/focus-trap pattern — apply same approach to drawer.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (open/close, focus trap, keyboard, overlay click), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all placements + sizes, CEM accurate, bundle < 5KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-drawer — T2 Slide-in Drawer/Panel
